channel.title: LLY — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on LLY (Eli Lilly) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED LLY (-23%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed LLY in Q4 2025 · 5.7% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED LLY (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added LLY in Q4 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)
